function.name: get_games
function.description: Fetch upcoming and live sports games with main market odds from Azuro/Pinwin on Polygon. Returns a human-readable list and structured JSON with conditionId and outcomeId needed to place bets. Call this when the user wants to browse games, check odds, or find a match to bet on. Always use the conditionId and outcomeId from this output — never guess or reuse values from previous sessions.

sport.description: Sport filter. Accepts common aliases: nba or basketball, nhl or hockey or ice-hockey, nfl or american-football, mlb or baseball, football or soccer, tennis, mma. Leave empty to fetch all sports.

league.description: League slug filter, e.g. 'nba', 'premier-league', 'nhl'. Leave empty for all leagues within the sport.

count.description: Number of games to return. Default 20, max 50.

function.name: place_bet
function.description: Place a decentralized sports bet on Azuro/Polygon via Pinwin. Executes a real on-chain transaction using the configured wallet. IMPORTANT SAFETY RULES: (1) Always confirm with the user before calling this function — show them match, selection, odds, and stake and wait for explicit YES. (2) Never retry or switch to a different game without new explicit user permission. (3) conditionId and outcomeId must always come from the most recent get_games output — never reuse values from previous messages or sessions.

conditionId.description: The conditionId for the chosen market. Must be taken from the most recent get_games output. Example: '300610060000000000292140160000000000001937222416'.

outcomeId.description: The outcomeId for the chosen selection. Must be taken from the most recent get_games output for the exact conditionId being used. Never reuse outcomeIds from previous sessions.

stake.description: Stake amount in USDT. For example 1 for 1 USDT, 2.5 for 2.5 USDT. Minimum recommended: 1 USDT.

startsAt.description: Unix timestamp of the game kickoff, from the get_games output. Used to schedule automatic result notification via watch-bets. Always pass this when available.

match.description: Human-readable match title from get_games output, e.g. 'Boston Celtics vs Memphis Grizzlies'. Used in result notification and confirmation message.

odds.description: Current odds for the selection from get_games output, e.g. 1.51. Used to compute minOdds with 2% slippage tolerance.

function.name: check_bets
function.description: Check the bet history and current status for the configured wallet. Returns pending, won, lost, and claimable bets. Call this proactively at the start of a conversation to surface any unread results or pending claims from previous sessions.

limit.description: Number of most recent bets to return. Default 20.

only_redeemable.description: If true, return only bets that are ready to claim (won or canceled, not yet redeemed). Useful when the user asks specifically about claimable winnings.

function.name: claim_bets
function.description: Redeem won or canceled bets on-chain. Sends a transaction to the Azuro ClientCore contract on Polygon to transfer winnings or refund stake. IMPORTANT: always confirm with the user before calling this function — show them the betIds and amounts being claimed and wait for explicit YES.

betIds.description: Array of on-chain betId numbers to claim. Get these from the check_bets output (redeemableBetIds field). Example: [42, 43].
